name: prominence

metadata.name: prominence
metadata.summary: PROMINENCE CLI for managing batch jobs running across clouds

documentation:
# PROMINENCE Command Line Interface

![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/prominence-eosc/cli)
[![PyPI version shields.io](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/prominence.svg)](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/ansicolortags/)

The PROMINENCE CLI presents a simple batch-system style interface to PROMINENCE. Written in Python, it can be installed easily on any system using pip:
```
pip install prominence
```
To upgrade the CLI the `--upgrade` option needs to be added:
```
pip install --upgrade prominence
```

See https://prominence-eosc.github.io/docs/ for more information.

classes.name: prominence.exceptions.ProminenceError
documentation: Base class for all PROMINENCE exceptions

documentation: Raised when we cannot connect to the PROMINENCE server

classes.name: prominence.exceptions.JobGetError
documentation: Raised when listing or describing a job fails

classes.name: prominence.exceptions.WorkflowGetError
documentation: Raised when listing or describing a workflow fails

classes.name: prominence.exceptions.FileUploadError
documentation: Raised when a file upload fails

classes.name: prominence.exceptions.StdStreamsError
documentation: Raised when there is a problem getting the standard output or error

classes.name: prominence.exceptions.IOError
documentation: Raised when there is a file read/write operation fails

classes.name: prominence.exceptions.ObjectError
documentation: Raised when there is an attempt to read/write objects fails

classes.name: prominence.exceptions.ExecError
documentation: Raised when there is an error executing a command inside a job

documentation: Raised when there is an error interacting with the key-value store
